# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.
# Category: container_security

# values.yaml
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: <your-repo-url>
  tag: latest
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80

ingress:
  enabled: true
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
  hosts:
    - host: example.com
      paths:
        - path: /
          pathType: Prefix
  tls:
    - secretName: example-tls
      hosts:
        - example.com

deployment:
  replicas: ${replicaCount}
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: 100m
      memory: 128Mi
    limits:
      cpu: 200m
      memory: 256Mi

podAnnotations:
  sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"

# deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: example-deployment
spec:
  replicas: ${replicaCount}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: example-app
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: example-container
          image: ${image.repository}:${image.tag}
          imagePullPolicy: ${image.pullPolicy}

# service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: example-app
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 80
  type: ClusterIP

# ingress.yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: example-ingress
spec:
  rules:
    - host: example.com
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            backend:
              service:
                name: example-service
                port:
                  number: 80

# requirements.yaml
dependencies:
  - name: nginx-ingress-controller
    version: ^1.2.0
  - name: istio
    version: ^1.12.0
